title: [Black Swan Castle, Ramparts]
description: The blank solid granite wall of the Black Swan casts a clammy chill over this part of the rampart path.  To the north, you see the dark green tops of oaks, with a smattering of pine and modwir trees.  A cold, strong updraft of air from the space between the outer wall and the back of the keep makes it difficult for you to keep your balance.
